articles.author: Wilson Mcmakin
articles.title: Ebola cases increase almost 40% in a week as death toll passes 200 - AP News
articles.description: The Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda has claimed 204 deaths, with 894 confirmed cases, Africa’s Centres for Disease Control and Prevention said. The outbreak is three times worse than a previous outbreak in Uganda in 2000, which had 281 cases at the same po…
articles.content: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) The Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda has claimed more than 200 lives in its first month and is the worst known outbreak at this stage, with up to 35,000 suspected potential cont… [+2817 chars]
